posts.author: Brante (Marcelo Brante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

Here in my company we use a lot Tvs with a Digital Signage players.
Today we take a print screen of our dashboards and put this on the digital signage.

We allready see that the Boards have the possibility to share a link to access without user and password, is there a possibility to make the same with dashboard?

Monday have a ideia to make this?

Our numbers change all day and make the pictures of this during all day is not a good work. If monday make this we can have a possibility to have “online” vision of our numbers.

posts.author: tyleramos (Tyler Amos)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking for something like this also, have you found a solution?
